sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, text_column STRING);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '🦆🤦🏼‍♂️🤦🏽‍♀️🦆'), (2, 'example string'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_lists (list_id INTEGER, number_list LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, substring_grapheme(text_column, 1, 5) AS grapheme_substr FROM test_strings WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, a.text_column, b.number_list FROM test_strings a JOIN test_lists b ON [2, 3] <@ b.number_list;
SELECT id, substring_grapheme(text_column, 2, 3) AS grapheme_substr FROM test_strings WHERE substring_grapheme(text_column, 1, 5) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings a JOIN test_lists b ON substring_grapheme(a.text_column, 1, 3) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.id HAVING [1] <@ b.number_list ;
SELECT substring_grapheme(text_column, 1, LENGTH(text_column) - 1) FROM test_strings WHERE text_column IS NOT NULL AND [1, 3] <@ [1, 2, 3];
SELECT IFNULL(substring_grapheme(text_column, 1, 10), 'No Data') AS result FROM test_strings WHERE text_column IS NULL;
